Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=[\(k,v\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if k not in \('created','modified'\)]; items.sort\(key=lambda x: x[1]\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in items[-10:]]")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const t=JSON.parse\(d\); const entries=Object.entries\(t\).filter\(\([k]\)=>k!=='created'&&k!=='modified'\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>a[1].localeCompare\(b[1]\)\).slice\(-10\); entries.forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(k,v\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const t=JSON.parse\(d\); const cutoff='2025-10-14'; const entries=Object.entries\(t\).filter\(\([k,v]\)=>k!=='created'&&k!=='modified'&&v<cutoff&&!k.includes\('alpha'\)&&!k.includes\('beta'\)&&!k.includes\('canary'\)\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>a[1].localeCompare\(b[1]\)\).slice\(-5\); entries.forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(k,v\)\);}\);")
